mapper.select: select s.seat_type as type, case seat_type when 1 then '一等座' when 2 then '二等座' end as name, s.price as price, sum(s.status = 0) as remaining_seats from seat s where s.ticket_id = #{id} group by s.seat_type, s.price
select s.seat_no as site, sum(s.status = 0) as count from seat s where s.ticket_id = #{ticketId} and s.seat_type = #{seatType} group by s.seat_no
SELECT id, seat_no, full_seat_code FROM seat WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} AND seat_type = #{seatType} AND order_id IS NULL AND status = 0 ORDER BY IF(seat_no = #{seatPosition}, 0, 1) , id LIMIT 1
select * from seat where order_id = #{orderId} limit 1
select * from seat where id = #{seatId} limit 1
select seat_type, full_seat_code from seat where order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.update: update seat set status = 0, order_id = null where order_id = #{orderId}
